SomaticSNVfind.annotation_files.description: Annotation files for featuremap generation: dbSNP, gnomAD, and UG High Confidence Regions with their indices. Required for full pipeline mode.

SomaticSNVfind.featuremap_params.description: FeatureMap parameters for snvfind. Required for full pipeline mode.

SomaticSNVfind.input_somatic_snvfind_vcf.description: Pre-existing somatic featuremap VCF file. When provided, runs classifier-only mode (skips featuremap generation).
Index file for pre-existing somatic featuremap VCF. Required when input_somatic_snvfind_vcf is provided.

SomaticSNVfind.interval_list.description: Input interval list file for scattering.

SomaticSNVfind.normal_cram_index_list.description: Array of input normal CRAM index files, matching the order of normal_crams. Required for full pipeline mode.

SomaticSNVfind.normal_crams.description: Array of input normal CRAM files. All files must have the same sample name. Required for full pipeline mode, not needed for classifier-only mode.

SomaticSNVfind.normal_single_read_snv_mo.description: Normal SingleReadSNVModel struct containing model_metadata and model_fold_files. Required for full pipeline mode.

SomaticSNVfind.num_shards.description: Number of shards for splitting the interval list.

SomaticSNVfind.override_memory_gb_Create.description: Override memory in GB for the CreateFeatureMap task, default: 2 (GiB). If an out of memory error occurs in the CreateFeatureMap task, try increasing this value, e.g. double it.

SomaticSNVfind.references.description: Input reference genome file, index file and dict.

SomaticSNVfind.scatter_intervals_break.description: Break scatter intervals at multiples of this value.

SomaticSNVfind.tumor_cram_index_list.description: Array of input tumor CRAM index files, matching the order of tumor_crams. Required for full pipeline mode.

SomaticSNVfind.tumor_crams.description: Array of input tumor CRAM files. All files must have the same sample name. Required for full pipeline mode, not needed for classifier-only mode.

SomaticSNVfind.tumor_single_read_snv_mod.description: Tumor SingleReadSNVModel struct containing model_metadata and model_fold_files. Required for full pipeline mode.

SomaticSNVfind.xgb_model.description: XGBoost model file for somatic featuremap classification.

SomaticSNVfind.xgb_proba_threshold.description: XGBoost probability threshold for somatic featuremap classification.
